name: Nyfain [Naga Apothecary]
description:
The descendants of the serpent god are called nagas, lamiai, or serpentfolk. They are humanoids with the lower halves of massive snakes and a few other fun, reptilian attributes. Nyfain is one such being, a serpentfolk apothecary who simply wants to live in peace among humans, but he's frequently accosted with prying eyes and endless questions. Will he ever be able to live a normal, quiet life as he wishes, or is he doomed to always be seen as "other"?

no major content warnings apply but yes he has two cocks
creator: webdallis
